THIS IS NONE OTHER THAN THE HOUSE OF GOD. This is a chosen place where a man in time of need will pray and his supplications will be accepted. Many ask, how could Jacob set up a pillar?34Deut. 16:22 prohibits setting up a pillar. However, they have forgotten that Moses set up twelve pillars.35Ex. 24:4. matches.lb: Quoting Commentary: Ibn Ezra on Deuteronomy 16:22:1
matches.x: NEITHER SHALT THOU SET THEE UP A PILLAR. For an idol, as which the Lord thy God hateth proves.76God hates a pillar set up to an idol. However, a pillar which is not set up for idol worship is permitted. The most convincing proof of this is found in the portion which opens with the words And Jacob sent (Gen. 32:4).77There, Scripture (Gen. 35:14) relates that Jacob set up a pillar to God. Also see I.E. on Gen. 28:17, (Vol. 1, p. 279), where he writes that Scripture does not prohibit a pillar to ho
